TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Tungpu_daigaz, title = Tungpu_daigaz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tungpu_daigaz} }

S.FORM: Tungpu daigaz Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Tungpu daigaz a niyaro', 98 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 395 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 362 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun87%, Truku1%, Amis1%, Cou1%, Paiwan2%, Seediq1%, roma1%.
S.PHON: to~u~uŇčpo~u~u …¨~…ģai*a* itiniaj i xinji ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u to~u~uŇčpo~u~u …¨~…ģai*a* a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, amis*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%, paiwan*%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma*%.
S.FORM: Tungpu daigaz Itiniay i Xinyi Cen no Nantou ko Tungpu daigaz a niyaro', 98 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 395 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 362 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 33 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun87%, Truku1%, Amis1%, Cou1%, Paiwan2%, Seediq1%, roma1%.
S.PHON: to~u~uŇčpo~u~u …¨~…ģai*a* itiniaj i xinji ¶…ôn no~u nanto~uo~u~u ko~u to~u~uŇčpo~u~u …¨~…ģai*a* a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un**%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, amis*%, ¶o~uo~u~u*%, paiwan*%, s…ô…ô…¨~…ģi**%, ro~uma*%.
